text.en: If your Army Faction is **THOUSAND SONS**, at the start of your Shooting phase, one or more models from your army with this ability can attempt Rituals from those listed on the right. To do so, select one model from your army with this ability that has not yet attempted a Ritual this turn and select one Ritual no model from your army has attempted to manifest this turn, then take a Psychic test for that model by following the sequence below.
Psychic Test Sequence
**Roll 2D6**

**Channel the Warp**
(Optional)
Then, if one or more doubles or triples were rolled during this test, that model’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

If that model is not destroyed, the combined total of all the dice rolled during this test is the Psychic test result. If this equals or exceeds the Warp Charge value of the Ritual being attempted, that model manifests that Ritual and you resolve its effects.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

Select one friendly **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead. In either case, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of the manifesting model); that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 11+, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds instead.

Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 12+, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.
When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** as your Army Faction.

**SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** units from your army have the following the ability:

**Daemonic Illusions (Aura):** While a friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

**THOUSAND SONS** units from your army have the following ability:

**Mortal Sorcery (Aura):** While a friendly **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS PSYKER** unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

• Friendly Tzaangors units have Battleline.
  • In your Shooting phase, while a friendly MUTANT unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range.
This detachment has the MUTANT tag and cannot be taken with another MUTANT detachment.
text.de:
• Befreundete Tzaangor-Einheiten haben Linientruppen.
  • Solange in deiner Fernkampfphase eine befreundete Mutant-Einheit schießt, haben feindliche Einheiten +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Mutant und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Mutant gewählt werden.
text.es:
• Las unidades Tzaangors amigas tienen Línea de batalla.
  • En tu fase de disparo, mientras una unidad MUTANTE amiga esté disparando, las unidades enemigas tienen +6" al alcance de detección.
Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta MUTANTES y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento MUTANTES.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Tzaangors amies ont Ligne.
  • À votre phase de Tir, tant qu’une unité de MUTANT amie est en train de tirer, les unités ennemies ont +6" en portée de détection.
Ce détachement a l’étiquette MUTANT et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement MUTANT.
text.it:
• Le unità di Tzaangor amiche hanno Linea di Battaglia.
  • Nella tua fase di Tiro, mentre un’unità Mutante amica tira, le unità nemiche hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Mutante e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Mutante.
text.ja:
• 味方ツァーンゴウル・ユニットはバトルラインを持つ。
  • 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方変異体・ユニットが射撃を行っている間、敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
このデタッチメントは変異体タグを持ち、他の変異体タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
• 아군 찬고어 유닛에 전열을 부여합니다.
  • 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 이형체 유닛이 사격을 수행하는 동안, 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
이 디태치먼트에 이형체 태그가 부여되며 다른 이형체 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方奸角兽单位拥有战线。
  • 在己方射击阶段中，己方变异生物单位射击时，敌方单位拥有 +6" 侦测范围.
本分遣队拥有变异生物标签，并且不能与另一个拥有变异生物标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: (Once per turn, per unit) When a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit (excluding Monster units) successfully manifests a Ritual, that unit heals D3 wounds.
text.de: (Einmal pro Zug, pro Einheit) Wenn eine befreundete Thousand-Sons-Psioniker-Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-Einheiten) erfolgreich ein Ritual vollführt, wird jene Einheit um W3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
text.es: (Una vez por turno, por unidad) Cuando una unidad Psíquico Mil Hijos amiga (salvo Monstruo) manifiesta un Ritual con éxito, esa unidad se cura 1D3 heridas.
text.fr: (Une fois par tour, par unité) Quand une unité de Psyker des Thousand Sons amie (unités de Monstre exclues) réussit à manifester un Rituel, elle soigne D3 PV.
text.it: (Una volta per turno, per unità) Quando un’unità Psionica dei Thousand Sons amica (escluse le unità Mostro) manifesta con successo un Rituale, quell’unità guarisce D3 ferite.
text.ja: （ユニットごとに、各ターンにつき1回）味方サウザンド・サン・サイカー・ユニット（モンスター・ユニットを除く）が儀式の発動に成功した時、そのユニットの【負傷限界】をD3ポイント回復する。
text.ko: (유닛마다 턴당 한 번) 아군 사우전드 선 사이커 유닛(괴수 유닛 제외)이 성공적으로 의식을 발현했을 때, 그 유닛은 D3 체력을 회복합니다.
text.zh: （每个单位，每个回合限一次）在一个己方千子灵能者单位（凶兽单位除外）成功进行一次仪式时，那个单位治疗 D3 处耐伤。

text.en:
• Friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit’s attacks have [Psychic].
  • Friendly Thousand Sons Psyker units have the following ability:
Infusion (Aura): While a friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit is within 12" of this unit, that unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS.
text.de:
• Attacken befreundeter Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheiten haben [Psionisch].
  • Befreundete Thousand-Sons-Psioniker-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit:
Kräftigung (Aura): Solange sich eine befreundete Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um diese Einheit befindet, haben die Nahkampfattacken jener Einheit +1 KG.
text.es:
• Los ataques de las unidades Robots Sekhetar amigas tienen [Psíquica].
  • Las unidades Psíquico Mil Hijos amigas tienen esta habilidad:
Potenciar (Aura): Mientras una unidad Robots Sekhetar amiga esté a 12" o menos de esta unidad, los ataques de combate de esa unidad tienen +1 a HA.
text.fr:
• Les attaques des unités de Robots Sekhetar amies [Psychique].
  • Les unités de Psyker des Thousand Sons amies ont aptitude suivante :
Infusion (Aura) : Tant qu’une unité de Robots Sekhetar amie est à 12" ou moins de cette unité, les attaques de mêlée de l’unité de Robots Sekhetar amie ont +1 en CC.
text.it:
• Gli attacchi delle unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amiche hanno [Psichica].
  • Le unità Psioniche dei Thousand Sons amiche hanno la seguente abilità:
Infusione (Aura): fintanto che un’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amica si trova entro 12" da questa unità, gli attacchi da mischia di quell’unità hanno +1 AC.
text.ja:
• 味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットの攻撃は［サイキック］を持つ。
  • 味方サウザンド・サン・サイカー・ユニットは、以下のアビリティを持つ：
  • 意思注入（オーラ）：味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットがこのユニットの12mv以内にいる間、その味方ユニットの白兵攻撃は【接】に＋1の修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 아군 세케타르 로봇 유닛의 공격에 [사이킥]을 부여합니다.
  • 아군 사우전드 선 사이커 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다.
주입(오라): 이 유닛의 12" 내에 아군 세케타르 로봇이 있는 동안, 그 유닛의 백병전 공격에 근접 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方塞克塔机器人单位的攻击拥有[灵能]。
  • 己方千子灵能者单位拥有以下技能：
输入意志（光环）：在一个己方塞克塔机器人单位位于该单位的 12" 内时，那个单位的近战攻击拥有 +1 WS。

text.en:
Each time a **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, apply one of the following when resolving those attacks:

■ If that **VEHICLE** unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** models, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll.
■ Otherwise, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll.

Each time a **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed while it is within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** models, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of only a 6.

Certain areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Flow of Magic, as follows:

■ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Flow of Magic.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Flow of Magic.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Flow of Magic.

Each time a **THOUSAND SONS** model from your army makes a Psychic Attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If such a model is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, each time it makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll instead.
In your Command phase, you can select one of the abilities listed below to take effect until the start of your next Command phase. You can only select each of these abilities once per battle.
Imbued Manifestation
Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by **THOUSAND SONS** models from your army.
Psychic Maelstrom
Each time a **THOUSAND SONS** model from your army makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.
Wrath of the Immaterium
Psychic weapons equipped by **THOUSAND SONS** models from your army have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot or fight and one or more **TZEENTCH MUTANT INFANTRY** or **TZEENTCH MUTANT MOUNTED** units from your army are selected as a target of one or more of those attacks, each of those **TZEENTCH MUTANT** units can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Each time a **TZEENTCH MUTANT INFANTRY** or **TZEENTCH MUTANT MOUNTED** unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, before selecting its targets, that unit can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
Each time an attack with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a **RUBRICAE** model from your army, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

name.ja: セケタール・コホート

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS** or **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Gouts of choking brimstone or arcane smog seeping from the Warp are exploited to confound the foe.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Amorphous runes and sigils carved into the armoured flanks of the Cabal’s war engines flare with unholy power, leaching the foe’s attacks of strength.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and, if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, each time an attack targets your unit, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

fluff.en: As the Thousand Sons solidify their control over sites of magical power, the Immaterium spills into reality in searing torrents, blossoming into a multi‑spectral storm of arcane energy that obscures mortal senses and mechanical augury.

target.en: One **RUBRIC MARINES** unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Massed in an unyielding wall of sorcerous ceramite, the sheer unnatural resilience of the Thousand Sons can withstand the most vicious assault.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase, that is within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** units.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by **VEHICLE** models in your unit have the **[PSYCHIC]** ability and each time an attack is made with such a weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Utilising the fell powers of the Warp, Thousand Sons Sorcerers infuse vehicles with empyric energies to render them even deadlier.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 9" to the Range characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The Thousand Sons’ flesh seethes with raw sorcery. The sheer unstoppable might of their conjurations is such that little can prevent them from manifesting devastation when unleashed with destructive intent.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker is mutated, and remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. While an objective marker is mutated and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Where the Warpforged Cabals spread their malignant change, the terrain erupts in uncontrolled mutation or transmogrifies into hazardous forms.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** units.

when.en: Your Command phase

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, your **VEHICLE** unit is malevolent. While a unit is malevolent, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

fluff.en: Whether a corrupted machine spirit or a cackling possessor daemon, the core animus of many Thousand Sons war engines seethe with a malignity that sees them unerringly strike out at prey even when critical systems are compromised.

target.en: One **RUBRIC MARINES** or **SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS** unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves.

when.en: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.

effect.en: If it is a **RUBRIC MARINES** unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Deep Strike ability. When your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is a **SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATOR** unit it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

restrictions.en: If a **SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS** unit is targeted with this Stratagem, it is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

fluff.en: With arcane energy flooding the battlefield, the veil between Warp and reality rapidly collapses. From yawning rifts emerge Rubricae reinforcements to ensure their thrallband’s victory.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control, if that objective marker is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Thousand Sons Sorcerers draw upon tide swells of Warp energy to weave spells of binding and warding, thereby shackling sites of arcane power to their own arrogant will.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, all attacks made against your unit with Psychic weapons have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability and all models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

fluff.en: To pit one’s own psychic prowess against the sorcerous might of the Thousand Sons is to be trapped, helpless and screaming, within one’s own mind.

target.en: That **PSYKER** model.

when.en: Any phase, just after a saving throw is failed for a **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model from your army. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple saving throws at once.

effect.en: Change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those attacks you failed a saving throw for.

fluff.en: The Architect of Fate has great designs for his pawns, which do not yet include their untimely demise.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: The Sorcerers of the Thousand Sons pour their corrupting spite and contempt into the bedrock of the battlefield, tainting it with their warpcraft.

target.en: That **THOUSAND SONS** model.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after you take a Psychic test for a **THOUSAND SONS** model from your army that Channelled the Warp (before resolving that Ritual).

effect.en: Re-roll all of the D6 rolled for that Psychic test (including the additional D6 for Channelling the Warp).

fluff.en: Using a locus formed from the ritually broken matter of sorcerous artefacts, a Sorcerer can infuse themselves with its power. So invigorated, their empyrically fuelled manipulations are made all the more potent.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS CHARACTER** model from your army (excluding **MONSTERS**) that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: At the end of the phase, add one **TZEENTCH CHAOS SPAWN** unit containing one model to your army, and set it up as close as possible to where your model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: For those already saturated by the coursing power of the Warp, even death is no barrier to change.

target.en: One **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS** units.

fluff.en: Semi-sentient doppelgangers stalk the battlefield, bewildering attempts to target the daemonic spawn.

target.en: One **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit from your army (excluding **MONSTERS**) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: Tzeentchian daemons can twist perceptions until they seem no longer there, bending light and dissipating technological targeting scans in a dizzying, fractal puzzle.

target.en: One friendly **unengaged** **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER**/**SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** unit.

when.en: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one **visible** enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit **declares a charge**, that enemy unit has -1 to **charge rolls**.

fluff.en: By sacrificing minute slivers of the oncoming foes’ lives, time can be bled into the Warp, stretching perceptions and causing sudden exhaustion.

target.en: Up to two **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** units from your army (excluding **MONSTERS**), or one **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS MONSTER** unit from your army, if all of those units are more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Weaving a spell of splintering translocation, Tzeentch’s daemons can prise open an unnatural pathway through the Warp.

target.en: That **VEHICLE** unit, and one friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit within 6" of that **VEHICLE** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your **VEHICLE** unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Technoshamanic rites can briefly possess a vehicle’s logic-cores, shackling its mechanisms to a new lore.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability. After your unit has shot this phase, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

fluff.en: At a spat curse, Warp‑infused ammunition can be made to glow with sulphurous flame, enabling it to burn through solid cover to strike enemies beyond. Those hit by the fusillade find their forms wreathed in illuminating azure fire.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Forewarned of the moment of their demise, the followers of Tzeentch allow the flood of magic to run rampant through their forms, providing them with a final burst of killing energy before unbound arcane force rips their bodies asunder.

target.en: That **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic when it is targeted with this Stratagem, then until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: By drawing upon their expanding nexus of magic, this disciple of Tzeentch can tear strands of temporal energy from the Warp and wind them around themselves and their thralls. Lent speed by this garland of stolen time, they melt away from their foes’ desperate strikes before lashing out again.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select the Imbued Manifestation, Psychic Maelstrom or Wrath of the Immaterium ability (see Kindred Sorcery). Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability applies to your unit instead of any other Kindred Sorcery ability, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

fluff.en: Drawing on the accumulating empyric energies, one devoted to Tzeentch will willingly syphon the swelling power to fuel their selfish ploys.

target.en: One **TZAANGORS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: With a shrieked plea to Tzeentch, mutant flesh can flicker between insubstantial states as if not there.

target.en: That **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit from your army is selected to fi ght.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", and when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

fluff.en: *With insane, bestial ferocity is true change wrought.*

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model from your army, and one friendly **TZAANGORS** unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 12" of that **PSYKER** model.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding **CHARACTERS**) to your **TZAANGORS** unit.

fluff.en: When Tzeentchian magicks wax strong, spirit and flesh are yoked again and again in service to the Great Sorcerer.

target.en: One **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: The mutagenic vitality flowing through the Thousand Sons’ twisted thralls can manifest in flickering bursts of supernatural speed.

target.en: One **TZEENTCH MUTANT** unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this phase.

when.en: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, or anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units if it is a **MONSTER** unit. In either case, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: The very flesh of a Warpmeld Pact’s mutant abominations radiates a reality-twisting aura. They may appear in one place to their foes, but things are not always as they seem.

target.en: That **RUBRICAE** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **RUBRICAE** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: The martial discipline once known amongst the Legion’s fellowships has been pared back and twisted until it is another means of control, one which the Rubricae’s masters use to wrong‑foot their foes with sudden changes of tactics.

target.en: One **RUBRICAE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance rolls made for it, and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

fluff.en: The warriors of the Thousand Sons can be driven on relentlessly while laying down a hail of weapons fire. They know no fatigue nor weakness, unable to falter even if they wished to.

target.en: One **RUBRICAE** unit from your army that was within 6" of that **PSYKER** model when it was destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after a **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model from your army is destroyed.

effect.en: After the attacking unit has shot, your **RUBRICAE** unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target the enemy unit that just destroyed your **PSYKER** model (and only if it is an eligible target).

fluff.en: Magnus’ psychic scions are as vindictive as their Daemon Primarch. Many weave arcane curses and runes of spite into the eldritch armour of their guardians. Should they fall, their Rubricae unleash a vengeful doom upon the executioners.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets for its attacks, it can only target your unit if there are no eligible **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** targets for those attacks.

fluff.en: Tendrils of phantasmal sorcery are sent to invade the minds of the Thousand Sons’ foes, magnifying the infernal threat until it eclipses all others in a kaleidoscope of insanity.

target.en: One **RUBRIC MARINES PSYKER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit (excluding **PSYKER** models), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: The Rubricae are superlative, enduring guardians who can absorb great storms of fire if it means shielding their masters.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Roll six D6: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. That enemy unit must then take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: On the hulls of vehicles swollen with the power of Tzeentch, gnashing maws open to spew warpfire over those nearby.

target.en: One **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, all inferno bolt pistols, inferno boltguns, inferno combi‑bolters and inferno combi‑weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PSYCHIC]** ability and a Strength characteristic of 5.

fluff.en: Arcane invocations imbue the Thousand Sons’ weapons with sorcerous power, rendering them still more lethal to the foe.

target.en: That <k>Monster Mutant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>モンスター・変異体</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>凶兽变异生物</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Monster Mutant unit is selected to move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Monster-­Mutant-Einheit zum Bewegen gewählt wird.
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Monstruo Mutante amiga se elige para mover.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Monstre Mutant amie est choisie pour être déplacée.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Mostro Mutante amica viene scelta per muoversi.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方モンスター・異変体・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 괴수 이형체 유닛이 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方凶兽变异生物单位被选择进行移动时。

effect.en: Your unit has <k>MOBILE</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは<k>高機動</k>を持つ。

fluff.en: The very fabric of reality runs like melting wax before this monstrous abomination, oozing aside to clear its path.
fluff.de: Die Regeln der Wirklichkeit selbst zerfließen vor dieser monströsen Scheußlichkeit wie Wachs und weichen vor ihrem Pfad.
fluff.es: El tejido mismo de la realidad se desliza como cera derretida ante esta monstruosa abominación, apartándose a un lado para despejar su camino.
fluff.fr: La trame de la réalité semble fondre comme de la cire devant cette abomination, en s'écartant sur son passage.
fluff.it: Il tessuto della realtà si scioglie come cera davanti a questo abominio, lasciandogli libero il passo.
fluff.ja: この忌まわしき怪異の歩みの前で、現実の構造は溶融する蝋のように歪み、ぬめりながら退いてその道を空ける。
fluff.ko: 이 거대한 혐오체 앞에서 현실의 타래는 한낱 왁스처럼 녹아내려 괴수의 길을 터준다.
fluff.zh: 在这些可怕的变异生物面前，现实本身就如同热蜡一般融化，为他们让路。

name.ja: 虹光（ルビ、虹光：プリズム）の転移

target.en: That <k>Infantry/Mounted Mutant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インファントリー/騎乗・変異体</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>步兵/骑乘变异生物</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit is selected to make an advance/fall back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Infanterie-/beritten-Mutant-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugs­bewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Mutante Infantería/Montada amiga hace un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’ k>Infanterie/Mutant Montée amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Mutante di Fanteria/In Sella amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方インファントリー/騎乗・変異体・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 보병/기승 이형체 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方步兵/骑乘变异生物单位被选择进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en:
• Your unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
  • That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot/declare a charge.
effect.de:
• Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben bis zum Ende des Zugs [Sturm].
  • Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen/einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es:
• Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen [Asalto] hasta el final del turno.
  • Ese movimiento no impide que tu unidad sea apta para disparar/para declarar cargas.
effect.fr:
• Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont [ASSAUT] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
  • Ce mouvement n'empêche pas votre unité d'être éligible pour tirer/déclarer une charge.
effect.it:
• Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno [Assalto] fino alla fine del turno.
  • Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare/dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja:
• そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は［アサルト］を持つ。
  • その移動を行った場合でも、そのユニットは射撃/突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko:
• 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [기동 사격]을 부여합니다.
  • 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격 및 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh:
• 在回合结束前，您的单位的远程攻击拥有[突击]。
  • 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击/宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: Flickering light like cast through a many-faceted gem, the skyborne warriors of Tzeentch seem to manifest and fade, then leap back into sharp relief elsewhere with sudden violence.
fluff.de: Wie flackernde Lichter in einem vielfacettigen Edelstein scheinen diese fliegenden Krieger des Tzeentch sich zu manifestieren und wieder zu verschwinden, nur um andernorts sehr wirklich und mit plötzlicher Gewalt aufzutauchen.
fluff.es: Con una luz parpadeante, como la de una gema de muchas caras, los guerreros celestiales de Tzeentch parecen manifestarse y desvanecerse, para luego resurgir con repentina violencia.
fluff.fr: Telle une lueur projetée à travers les facettes d'une gemme, les guerriers aéroportés de Tzeentch semblent apparaître et s'évanouir, puis réapparaître ailleurs en fondant sur l'ennemi comme une pointe acérée.
fluff.it: Simili a luci riflesse da gemme sfaccettate, i guerrieri volanti di Tzeentch paiono manifestarsi e svanire, per poi riapparire altrove in un’esplosione di improvvisa violenza.
fluff.ja: 飛翔するティーンチの戦士は、多面の宝玉を通したかのような屈折光を揺らめかせ、姿を現したかと思えば再び消え去る。そして瞬時に位置をずらして別の地点へと跳躍し、猛然たる勢いとともに現れる。
fluff.ko: 다면체 보석에 빛이 굴절되어 퍼지니, 친취의 창공을 누비는 투사들은 나타났다 사라지길 반복한다. 그러다 한순간에 적의를 드러내며 어디선가 등장한다.
fluff.zh: 如同宝石一般闪烁，奸奇的飞空战士们似乎能够突然消失，之后又在别处突然出现。

target.en: That <k>Infantry/Mounted Mutant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>インファントリー/騎乗・変異体</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>步兵/骑乘变异生物</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit is selected to make an advance/fall back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Infanterie-/beritten-Mutant-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugs­bewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Mutante Infantería/Montada amiga hace un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’Infanterie/Mutant Montée amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Mutante di Fanteria/In Sella amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方インファントリー/騎乗・変異体・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 보병/기승 이형체 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方步兵/骑乘变异生物单位进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en: In a turn your unit made an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: In einem Zug, in dem deine Einheit eine Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung ausgeführt hat, verhindert jene Bewegung nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: En un turno en el que tu unidad hizo algún movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder, ello no impide que tu unidad sea apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: À un tour où votre unité a fait un mouvement d’avance/de retraite, ce dernier ne l’empêche pas d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: In un turno in cui la tua unità ha effettuato un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento, quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を行ったターン中でも、その移動を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동을 수행한 턴에, 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 특수 행동 시작이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 在您的单位进行了一次突进/后撤移动的回合中，那次移动不会阻止那个单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: Time runs differently around these warriors, allowing them ample space to act while their foes appear to lurch sluggishly on around them.
fluff.de: Um diese Krieger fließt die Zeit anders und gibt ihnen jede Menge Raum zum Handeln, während ihre Feinde um sie herum nur qualvoll langsam zu kriechen scheinen.
fluff.es: El tiempo discurre de forma diferente alrededor de estos guerreros, lo que les permite un amplio margen de acción mientras sus enemigos parecen tambalearse lentamente a su alrededor.
fluff.fr: Le temps s’écoule différemment autour de ces guerriers, leur laissant un ample délai pour agir tandis que leurs ennemis semblent chanceler mollement autour d’eux.
fluff.it: Il tempo scorre in maniera differente attorno a questi guerrieri, consentendo loro di agire mentre il nemico arranca.
fluff.ja: これらの戦士の周囲では時間の流れが異なり、敵は緩慢に引き延ばされたかのように動く。その時間の差によって、戦士たちが余裕ある行動を取ることができる。
fluff.ko: 이 투사들 주변은 시간이 다르게 흐른다. 덕분에 주위의 적이 느릿느릿 움직이는 동안 이들은 여유롭게 대응할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 时间在这些战士身边的运作方式不同，在敌人缓慢行动的时候他们反而有足够的时间展开行动。

target.en: That <k>Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Psyker</k> d’<k>Infanterie/Montée</k> des <k>Thousand Sons</k>.
target.ja: その<k>インファントリー/騎乗・サウザンド・サン・サイカー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>步兵/骑乘千子灵能者</k>单位。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly <k>Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker</k> unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Infanterie</k>-<k>/beritten</k>-<k>Thousand</k>-<k>Sons</k>-<k>Psioniker</k>-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad  <k>Infantería/Montada Psíquico Mil Hijos</k> amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de <k>Psyker</k> d’<k>Infanterie/Montée</k> des <k>Thousand Sons</k> amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità <k>Psionica</k> di <k>Fanteria/In Sella</k> dei <k>Thousand Sons</k> amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方<k>インファントリー/騎乗・サウザンド・サン・サイカー</k>・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 <k>보병/기승 사우전드 선 사이커</k> 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方<k>步兵/骑乘千子灵能者</k>单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 5+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 5+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: As quickly as these warriors are wounded, so their corporeal forms regenerate with supernatural swiftness.
fluff.de: So schnell wie diese Krieger verwundet werden, regenerieren ihre stofflichen Leiber mit übernatürlicher Geschwindigkeit.
fluff.es: Tan rápido como estos guerreros son heridos, sus cuerpos se regeneran con una rapidez sobrenatural.
fluff.fr: Aussitôt qu'ils sont blessés, ces guerriers voient leur enveloppe corporelle se régénérer de façon surnaturelle.
fluff.it: Appena questi guerrieri vengono feriti, i loro corpi materiali si rigenerano a velocità sovrannaturale.
fluff.ja: これらの戦士は傷を負うや否や、その肉体を超常的な速さで再生させる。
fluff.ko: 이 전사들이 상처를 입자마자 그 즉시 초자연적인 재생력으로 이를 수복한다.
fluff.zh: 这些战士几乎能在受伤的那一刻就立即开始恢复。

target.en: That <k>Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Psyker</k> d’<k>Infanterie/Montée</k> des <k>Thousand Sons</k>.
target.ja: その<k>インファントリー/騎乗・サウザンド・サン・サイカー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>步兵/骑乘千子灵能者</k>单位。
