when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Infantería/Montada Psíquico Mil Hijos amiga hace un movimiento de avanzar/de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité amie de Psyker d’Infanterie/Montée des Thousand Sons amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance/de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Psionica di Fanteria/In Sella dei Thousand Sons amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata/ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方サウザンド・サン・サイカー・ユニットが全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 보병/기승 사우전드 선 사이커 유닛이 급속/후퇴 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方步兵/骑乘千子灵能者单位进行一次突进/后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 아군 유닛이 그 이동을 수행하더라도 특수 행동을 시작할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: So unstoppable is the torrent of life rushing through these warriors that their bodies and even their wargear sprout nests of twitching limbs that move and act with a mind of their own.
fluff.de: Das wimmelnde Leben, welches durch die Adern dieser Krieger strömt, ist so unfaufhaltsam, dass aus ihren Leibern und selbst ihrer Ausrüstung Nester zuckender Gliedmaßen sprießen, die mit eigenem Bewusstsein handeln.
fluff.es: Tan imparable es el torrente de vida que recorre a estos guerreros que sus cuerpos e incluso su equipo generan bultos y extremidades temblorosas que se mueven y actúan con voluntad propia.
fluff.fr: Le torrent de vie coulant dans ces guerriers est si puissant que de leurs corps et même de leur équipement jaillissent des membres qui semblent agir de leur propre chef.
fluff.it: Il flusso vitale che scorre in questi guerrieri è talmente inarrestabile che i loro corpi e persino gli equipaggiamenti generano matasse di arti guizzanti che si muovono e agiscono indipendentemente.
fluff.ja: この戦士らの体内を駆け巡る生命の奔流は止めがたく、その肉体のみならず、装備にまでも肢の群れが芽吹いてくる。それらはまるで、独自の意志を持つかのように動き出す。
fluff.ko: 이 전사에게 흘러드는 생명의 격류가 어찌나 사나운지 육체뿐만 아니라 전투장비마저 사방으로 경련을 일으키며 사지가 돋아난다. 심지어 제각각 의지를 가진 양 움직여댄다.
fluff.zh: 生命洪流以势不可挡之势奔涌流经这些战士体内，以至于他们的躯体乃至战甲之上竟生出一丛丛抽搐蠕动的肢体——这些肢体拥有独立的意志，自发地行动与运作。

target.en: One friendly engaged Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
target.fr: Une unité de Psyker des Thousand Sons amie non engagée.
target.ja: 味方の接敵状態であるサウザンド・サン・サイカー・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 교전 상태인 아군 사우전드 선 사이커 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一个处于交战状态的己方千子灵能者单位。

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de combate.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Combat.

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll six D6:
  • For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit. Wirf sechs W6:
  • Für jede 4+ erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 1 tödliche Verwundung.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga trabada con tu unidad. Tira seis D6:
  • Por cada 4+, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1 herida mortal.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie engagée avec votre unité. Jetez six D6 :
  • Pour chaque jet de 4+, l’unité ennemie subit 1 blessure mortelle.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica ingaggiata con la tua unità. Tira sei D6:
  • Per ogni 4+ quell’unità nemica subisce 1 ferita mortale.
effect.ja:
その自軍のユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニットを1個選択する。D6を6個ロールする：
  • ロール結果で4+が出るごとに、その敵ユニットは1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛과 교전 중인 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. D6를 여섯 개 굴립니다.
  • 값이 4+이면, 그 적 유닛이 1 치명상을 입습니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位。掷六枚 D6:
  • 每有一个结果为 4+，那个敌方单位便受到 1 处致命伤。

fluff.en: Focusing the unholy energies of their ritual into the bodies of the foe, the champions of Tzeentch cause them to erupt into a riot of gruesome and unstoppable mutation.
fluff.de: Diese Champions des Tzeentch konzentrieren ihr Ritual auf die Leiber der Feinde und verursachen eine Woge scheußlicher und unaufhaltsamer Mutation.
fluff.es: Concentrando las energías impías de su ritual en los cuerpos de sus enemigos, los campeones de Tzeentch los hacen estallar en un caos de mutaciones espantosas e imparables.
fluff.fr: En concentrant l'énergie impie de leur rituel dans les corps des ennemis, les champions de Tzeentch provoquent une éruption de mutations incontrôlables.
fluff.it: Concentrando le empie energie del loro rituale nei corpi dei nemici, i campioni di Tzeentch li fanno esplodere in una baraonda di mutazioni inarrestabili.
fluff.ja: ティーンチの戦士は、儀式によって蓄えた不浄のエネルギーを標的の身体に注ぎ込み、敵をおぞましくも止めがたい変異の奔流へと陥れる。
fluff.ko: 의식으로 끌어낸 불길한 에너지를 적의 체내에 주입한 친취의 용사는 이내 그 힘을 이용해 적을 제지할 수 없는 끔찍한 이형체로 일그러뜨린다.
fluff.zh: 通过将仪式的不洁能量传入敌人的体内，奸奇的使者们能够造成可怕变异的爆发。

target.en: That <k>SEKHETAR ROBOTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セケタール・ロボット</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>塞克塔机器人</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit within 12" of a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Sekhetar-­Roboter-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um eine befreundete Thousand-Sons-Psioniker-Einheit eine Aktion beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de disparo cuando una unidad Robots Sekhetar amiga a 12" o menos de alguna unidad Psíquico Mil Hijos inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Robots Sekhetar amie à 12" ou moins d'une unité de Psyker des Thousand Sons amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amica entro 12" da un’unità Psionica dei Thousand Sons amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中、味方サウザンド・サン・サイカー・ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っている味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットがアクションを開始する時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 사우전드 선 사이커 유닛의 12" 내에 있는 아군 세케타르 로봇 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段中，在一个位于己方千子灵能者单位 12" 内的己方塞克塔机器人单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Employing a form of limited astral projection, the Sorcerer possesses these robots and then extrudes ectoplasmic limbs from within their bodies to work his will even as they continue to fight.
fluff.de: Der Hexer setzt auf eine Art begrenzter Astralprojektion, um von einem der Roboter Besitz zu ergreifen, und streckt dann ektoplasmatische Gliedmaßen aus dessen Körper heraus, um seine Ziele voranzutreiben, noch während die Maschine weiterkämpft.
fluff.es: Mediante una proyección astral limitada, el Hechicero posee a estos robots y luego extruye extremidades ectoplásmicas de su interior para ejercer su voluntad mientras continúan luchando.
fluff.fr: À l'aide d'une forme limitée de projection astrale, le Sorcier prend possession de ces robots, d'où il fait poindre des membres ectoplasmiques pour accomplir sa volonté alors même que les machines continuent de se battre.
fluff.it: Grazie a una forma limitata di proiezione astrale lo Stregone possiede questi robot, che estroflettono arti ectoplasmatici per compiere la sua volontà mentre continuano a combattere.
fluff.ja: 部分的な霊体投射によって、妖術師は機械兵に憑依する。そして内側から霊質の腕を伸ばし、自身の力を振るいながら戦闘を継続するのだ。
fluff.ko: 마법사는 제한적인 영적 투사를 활용해 로봇을 장악한다. 몸통에서 엑토플라스마 사지를 돋게 하여 전투를 이어 나가는 동안에도 자신의 의지를 관철토록 한다.
fluff.zh: 这位术士运用一种受限的星体投射之术，附身于这些机器人体内；随后，他从其躯体内部伸出灵质肢体，在机器人持续战斗的同时，借此贯彻自己的意志。

target.en: That <k>SEKHETAR ROBOTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セケタール・ロボット</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>塞克塔机器人</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>SEKHETAR ROBOTS</k> unit within 12" of a friendly <k>Thousand Sons Psyker</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Sekhetar-Roboter</k>-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um eine befreundete <k>Thousand</k>-<k>Sons</k>-<k>Psioniker</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Robots Sekhetar</k> amiga que está a 12" o menos de alguna unidad <k>Psíquico Mil Hijos</k>.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Robots Sekhetar</k> amie à 12" ou moins d'une unité de <k>Psyker</k> des <k>Thousand Sons</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità di <k>ROBOT SEKHETAR</k> amica entro 12" da un’unità <k>Psionica</k> dei <k>Thousand Sons</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、味方<k>サウザンド・サン・サイカー</k>・ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っている味方<k>セケタール・ロボット</k>を攻撃対象として選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>사우전드 선 사이커</k> 유닛의 12" 내에 있는 아군 <k>세케타르 로봇</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位将位于己方<k>千子灵能者</k>单位 12" 内一个己方<k>塞克塔机器人</k>选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont ‑1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした射撃攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 원거리 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对您的单位进行的远程攻击的 S 属性大于该单位的 T 属性时，攻击的致伤掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: Weaving sorcery into a shimmering shield, the sorcerer protects his enslaved automata from harm.
fluff.de: Dieser Hexer webt einen schimmernden Schild aus Magie, um seine untergebenen Maschinen zu schützen.
fluff.es: Tejiendo un escudo reluciente con métodos arcanos, el hechicero protege a sus esclavos autómatas.
fluff.fr: Le sorcier dresse un bouclier magique scintillant qui protège ses automates.
fluff.it: Lo stregone protegge i suoi automi intessendo incantesimi in uno scudo scintillante.
fluff.ja: ソーサラーは魔力で揺光する盾を生み出し、隷属させた自動機械を危害から守る。
fluff.ko: 마법사는 술법으로 빛이 감도는 보호막을 생성해 자신이 노예로 부리는 오토마타를 보호한다.
fluff.zh: 巫师将法术编织成闪耀的护盾，保护手下的机器奴仆。

target.en: One friendly <k>SEKHETAR ROBOTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>セケタール・ロボット</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>塞克塔机器人</k>单位。

when.en: End of your Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个您的单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: Even as they cross the battlefield, so these Sekhetar Robots vent glittering sorcerous residue that contaminates sites of power and importance.
fluff.de: Während die Sekhetar-Roboter das Schlachtfeld überqueren, stoßen sie schimmernde Abgase aus, die Orte der Macht und Bedeutsamkeit verschmutzen.
fluff.es: Incluso al cruzar el campo de batalla, estos Robots Sekhetar liberan brillantes residuos hechiceros que contaminan lugares de poder e importancia.
fluff.fr: Tout en arpentant le champ de bataille, ces Robots Sekhetar évacuent des résidus de sorcellerie qui contaminent les sites de pouvoir et d'importance.
fluff.it: Mentre attraversano il campo di battaglia, questi Robot Sekhetar emettono residui arcani luccicanti che contaminano luoghi di potere e siti importanti.
fluff.ja: これらのセケタール・ロボットは、戦場を移動する間も煌めく魔術の残滓を噴き出し、重要な力場や拠点を魔力で染めてゆく。
fluff.ko: 전장을 가로지를 때조차 세케타르 로봇은 마법의 잔재를 배출해 요충지를 더럽힌다.
fluff.zh: 在穿越战场的过程中，这些塞克塔机器人能够排放出闪烁的巫术残留物，将重要地点污染。

name.ja: 狩るべくして生まれた（アップグレード）

description.en:
Spawn unit only. This unit’s melee attacks have:
  • +1 AP.
  • [Cleave 1].
description.de:
Nur für eine Brut-Einheit. Nahkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben:
  • +1 DS.
  • [Spalten 1].
description.es:
Solo unidad Engendro. Los ataques de combate de esta unidad tienen:
  • +1 a FP.
  • [Tajar 1].
description.fr:
Unité de Rejetons seulement. Les attaques de mêlée de cette unité ont :
  • +1 en PA.
  • [Abattage 1].
description.it:
Solo unità di Progenie. Gli attacchi da mischia di questa unità hanno:
  • +1 VP.
  • [Falciare 1].
description.ja:
スポーン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの白兵攻撃は：
  • 【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
  • ［蹂躙1］を持つ。
description.ko:
이물 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 백병전 공격에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • 관통 +1
  • [베어가르기 1]
description.zh:
仅限魔物单位。该单位的近战攻击拥有：
  • +1 AP。
  • [劈砍 1]。

name.ja: 解（ルビ、解：ほど）かれし運命

description.en: Tzaangor Shaman model only. In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit's move, you can select one friendly battle-shocked Mutant unit within 6" of this model. That unit is no longer battle-shocked.
description.de: Nur für ein Tzaangor-Schamane-Modell. In deiner Bewegungsphase kannst du zu Beginn oder am Ende der Bewegung dieser Einheit eine erschütterte befreundete Mutant-Einheit innerhalb von 6" um dieses Modell wählen. Jene Einheit ist nicht länger erschüttert.
description.es: Solo miniatura Chamán Tzaangor. En tu fase de movimiento, al inicio o al final del movimiento de esta unidad, puedes elegir 1 unidad Mutante amiga acobardada a 6" o menos de esta miniatura. Esa unidad deja de estar acobardada.
description.fr: Figurine de Chaman Tzaangor seulement. À votre phase de Mouvement, au début ou à la fin du mouvement de cette unité, vous pouvez choisir une unité de Mutant amie ébranlée à 6" ou moins de cette figurine. L’unité choisie n’est plus ébranlée.
description.it: Solo modelli di Tzaangor Sciamano. Nella tua fase di Movimento, all’inizio o alla fine del movimento di questa unità, puoi scegliere un’unità Mutante traumatizzata amica entro 6" da questo modello. Quell’unità non è più traumatizzata.
description.ja: ツァーンゴール・シャーマン・兵のみ。自軍側移動フェイズ中、このユニットの移動開始または終了時、自軍はこの兵の6mv以内に一部でも入っており、 戦闘ショック状態の味方 ミュータント・ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された味方ユニットは戦闘ショック状態ではなくなる。
description.ko: 찬고어 주술사 모델 전용. 플레이어의 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 이동 시작 또는 종료 시, 이 모델의 6" 내에 있는 전투충격 상태의 아군 이형체 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 유닛은 전투충격 상태에서 벗어납니다.
description.zh: 仅限奸角兽萨满模型。在己方移动阶段中，在该单位开始或结束一次移动时，您可以选择一个位于该模型 6" 内且处于战斗震慑状态的变异生物单位。那个单位不再处于战斗震慑状态。

description.en: Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker model only. When this model heals as a result of the Sorcerous Invigoration detachment rule, you can add 3 to the number of wounds healed.
description.de: Nur für ein beritten-/Infanterie-Thousand-Sons-Psioniker-Modell. Wenn dieses Modell durch die Kontingentsregel Magische Kräftigung geheilt wird, kannst du 3 zur Anzahl der geheilten Lebenspunkte addieren.
description.es: Solo miniatura Infantería/Montada Psíquico Mil Hijos. Cuando esta miniatura se cura debido a la regla de destacamento Potenciación hechicera, puedes sumar 3 al número de heridas que se cura.
description.fr: Figurine de Psyker d’Infanterie/Montée des Thousand Sons seulement. Quand cette figurine soigne grâce à l’utilisation de la règle de détachement Sortilège Régénérant, vous pouvez ajouter 3 au nombre de points de vie soignés.
description.it: Solo modelli di Psionico di Fanteria/In Sella dei Thousand Sons. Quando questo modello guarisce come conseguenza della regola del distaccamento Rinvigorimento Stregato, puoi aggiungere 3 al numero di ferite guarite.
description.ja: インファントリー/騎乗・サウザンド・サン・サイカー・兵のみ。この兵が『妖力活性』のデタッチメントルールの効果で【負傷限界】を回復する際、回復する【負傷限界】の数に+3の修正を加える。
description.ko: 보병/기승 사우전드 선 사이커 기승 모델 전용. 이 모델이 마법적 활력 디태치먼트 규칙으로 인해 회복한다면, 3 체력을 추가로 회복할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限步兵/骑乘千子灵能者模型。在该模型因巫术活力分遣队规则进行治疗时，您可以使被治疗的耐伤数量增加 3 点。

description.en: Sorcerer/Exalted Sorcerer model only. In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit’s move, you can select one friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit within 6" of this unit. That unit’s ranged attacks have +1 BS until the start of your next turn.
description.de: Nur für ein Hexer-/Erhabener-Hexer-Modell. In deiner Bewegungsphase kannst du zu Beginn oder am Ende der Bewegung dieser Einheit eine befreundete Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheit innerhalb von 6" wählen. Bis zum Beginn deines nächsten Zugs haben Fernkampfattacken jener Einheit +1 BF.
description.es: Solo miniatura Hechicero/Hechicero Exaltado. En tu fase de movimiento, al inicio o al final del movimiento de esta unidad, puedes elegir 1 unidad Robots Sekhetar amiga a 6" o menos de esta unidad. Los ataques a distancia de esa unidad tienen +1 a HP hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno.
description.fr: Figurine de Sorcier/Sorcier Exalté seulement. À votre phase de Mouvement, au début ou à la fin du mouvement de cette unité, vous pouvez choisir une unité de Robots Sekhetar amie à 6" ou moins d’elle. Les attaques de tir de l’unité choisie ont +1 en CT jusqu’au début de votre prochain tour.
description.it: Solo modelli di Stregone/Stregone Esaltato. Nella tua fase di Movimento, all’inizio o alla fine del movimento di questa unità, puoi scegliere un’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amica entro 6" da questa unità. Gli attacchi da tiro di quell’unità hanno +1 AB fino all’inizio del tuo prossimo turno.
description.ja: ソーサラー/エグザルテッド・ソーサラー・兵のみ。自軍側移動フェイズ中、このユニットの移動の開始時または終了時に、このユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っている味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットを1個選択できる。次の自軍側移動フェイズ開始時まで、選択された味方ユニットの【射】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 마법사/상위 마법사 모델 전용. 플레이어의 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 이동 시작 또는 종료 시, 이 유닛의 6" 내에 있는 세케타르 로봇 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 플레이어의 다음 턴이 시작될 때까지 그 유닛의 원거리 공격에 사격 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限巫师/高阶巫师模型。在己方移动阶段中，当该单位开始或结束一次移动时，您可以选择一个位于该单位 6" 内的己方塞克塔机器人。直到下一个己方回合开始前，那个单位的远程攻击拥有 +1 BS。

description.en:
Sorcerer/Exalted Sorcerer model only. This model has the following abilities:
  • Soul Bound: In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit’s move, you can select one friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit within 3" of this model. That SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit heals D3+1 wounds.
  • Kine‑shielded Guardians: While this model is within 3" of a friendly SEKHETAR ROBOTS unit, this model has Lone Operative.
description.de:
Nur für ein Hexer-/Erhabener-Hexer-Modell. Dieses Modell hat die folgenden Fähigkeiten:
  • Seelengebunden: In deiner Bewegungsphase kannst du zu Beginn oder am Ende der Bewegung dieser Einheit eine befreundete Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheit innerhalb von 3" um dieses Modell wählen. Jene Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheit wird um W3+1 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
  • Niedere Wächter: Solange sich dieses Modell innerhalb von 3" um eine befreundete Sekhetar-Roboter-Einheit befindet, hat es Einsamer Wolf.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Hechicero/Hechicero Exaltado. Esta miniatura tiene estas habilidades:
  • Unión de almas: En tu fase de movimiento, al inicio o al final del movimiento de esta unidad, puedes elegir 1 unidad Robots Sekhetar amiga a 3" o menos de esta miniatura. Esa unidad Robots Sekhetar se cura 1D3+1 heridas.
  • Guardianes con escudo cinético : Mientras esta miniatura esté a 3" o menos de alguna unidad Robots Sekhetar amiga, esta miniatura tiene Agente solitario.
description.fr:
Figurine de Sorcier/Sorcier Exalté seulement. Cette figurine a les aptitudes suivantes :
  • Âme Liée : À votre phase de Mouvement, au début ou à la fin du mouvement de cette unité, vous pouvez choisir une unité de Robots Sekhetar amie à 3" ou moins de cette figurine. L’unité de Robots Sekhetar choisie soigne D3+1 points de vie.
  • Gardiens à Bouclier Cinétique : Tant que cette figurine est à 3" ou moins d’une unité de Robots Sekhetar amie, cette figurine a Agent Solitaire.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Stregone/Stregone Esaltato. Questo modello ha le seguenti abilità:
  • Legato nello Spirito: nella tua fase di Movimento, all’inizio o alla fine del movimento di questa unità, puoi scegliere un’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amica entro 3" da questo modello. Quell’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR guarisce D3+1 ferite.
  • Guardiani Kineprotetti: fintanto che questo modello si trova entro 3" da un’unità di ROBOT SEKHETAR amica, questo modello ha Agente Solitario.
description.ja:
ソーサラー/エグザルテッド・ソーサラー・兵のみ。この兵は以下のアビリティを持つ：
  • 魂魄の束縛：自軍側移動フェイズ中、このユニットの移動開始時あるいは終了時、この兵の3mv以内に一部でも入っている味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットを1体選択できる。選択されたセケタール・ロボット・ユニットは【負傷限界】をD3+1ポイント回復する。
  • 念盾の守護者：この兵が味方セケタール・ロボット・ユニットの3mv以内に一部でも入っている間、この兵は『単独工作員』を持つ。
description.ko:
마법사/상위 마법사 모델 전용. 이 모델에 다음 능력을 부여합니다.
  • 혼령 속박: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 이동 시작 또는 종료 시, 이 모델의 3" 내에 있는 아군 세케타르 로봇 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 세케타르 로봇 유닛은 D3+1 체력을 회복합니다.
  • 염력 보호막을 두른 수호자: 이 모델이 아군 세케타르 로봇 유닛의 3" 내에 있는 동안, 이 모델에 단독 요원을 부여합니다.
description.zh:
仅限巫师/高阶巫师模型。该模型拥有以下技能：
  • 灵魂绑定：在您的移动阶段中，当该单位开始或结束一次移动时，您可以选择一个位于该模型 3" 内的己方塞克塔机器人单位。那个塞克塔机器人单位治疗 D3+1 处耐伤。
  • 傀儡护盾：在该模型位于一个己方塞克塔机器人单位的 3" 内时，该模型拥有独行特工。

description.en:
Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker model only. The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6:
  • On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed, unengaged, with 3 wounds remaining.
description.de:
Nur für ein beritten-/Infanterie-Thousand-Sons-Psioniker-Modell. Wenn dieses Modell zum ersten Mal zerstört wird, wirf am Ende der Phase einen W6:
  • Bei 2+ stelle dieses Modell mit 3 verbleibenden Lebenspunkten so nahe wie möglich an dem Punkt auf dem Schlachtfeld wieder auf, wo es zerstört wurde, sodass es nicht im Nahkampf ist.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Infantería/Montada Psíquico Mil Hijos. La primera vez que esta miniatura sea eliminada, al final de la fase, tira 1D6:
  • Con 2+, despliega de nuevo esta miniatura en el campo de batalla lo más cerca posible de donde estaba cuando fue eliminada, no trabada y con 3 heridas restantes.
description.fr:
Figurine de psyker d’Infanterie/montée des Thousand Sons seulement. La première fois que cette figurine est détruite, à la fin de la phase, jetez un D6 :
  • Sur 2+, replacez cette figurine sur le champ de bataille aussi près que possible de l’endroit où elle a été détruite, non engagée, avec 3 PV Restants.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Psionico di Fanteria/In Sella dei Thousand Sons. La prima volta che questo modello viene distrutto, alla fine della fase tira un D6:
  • Con 2+ rischiera questo modello sul campo, il più vicino possibile a dove è stato distrutto, non ingaggiato e con 3 ferite rimanenti.
description.ja:
インファントリー/騎乗・サウザンド・サン・サイカー・兵のみ。この兵が初めて撃破された時、そのフェイズ終了時にD6を1個ロールする：
  • ロール結果が2+であれば、この兵を撃破された地点に可能な限り近く、かつ非接敵状態となる位置に、【負傷限界】が3ポイント残っている状態で再配置する。
description.ko:
보병/기승 사우전드 선 사이커 모델 전용. 이 모델이 처음 파괴됐을 때, 페이즈 종료 시, D6를 하나 굴립니다.
  • 값이 2+이면, 전장에서 파괴된 위치와 최대한 가까운 곳이자, 교전 상태가 아닌 위치에, 남은 체력이 3인 상태로 이 모델을 놓습니다.
description.zh:
仅限步兵/骑乘千子灵能者模型。当该模型首次被摧毁，在该阶段结束时，掷一枚 D6：
  • 如果结果为 2+，将该模型放回战场上尽可能靠近其被摧毁的位置， 不处于交战状态，且剩余 3 点耐伤。

description.en: **THOUSAND SONS** model only. Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

**EXALTED SORCERER** model only. Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army has already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

**THOUSAND SONS** or **LORD OF CHANGE** model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.
**THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **SCINTILLATING LEGIONS** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

**THOUSAND SONS** or **LORD OF CHANGE** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **THOUSAND SONS** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
**THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

**TZAANGOR SHAMAN** model only. Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.
**TZAANGOR SHAMAN** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
**SORCERER** or **INFERNAL MASTER** model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a **TZAANGORS** unit.
**TZAANGOR SHAMAN** model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two **RUBRICAE BATTLELINE** units from your army or one other **RUBRICAE** unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While a friendly **RUBRICAE** unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a **RUBRICAE** model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.
**THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the **[SUSTAINED HITS D3]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp, after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those **VEHICLE** units; that **VEHICLE** unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.
**THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability
**THOUSAND SONS** model only. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

**THOUSAND SONS** model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS VEHICLE** units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three **THOUSAND SONS** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
Each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** inferno bolt pistol; Transmogrifying Blast, Black Staff of Ahriman.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Ahriman fights with singular focus and frightening determination. At range he unleashes storms of psychic fury that transmogrify, mutate and erase from existence all who stand before him. Swooping low upon his Disc of Tzeentch, the Arch-Sorcerer strikes down any who survive with his terrifying Black Staff.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RUBRIC MARINES** ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED** ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED WITH FATECASTER GREATBOWS**

description.en: Each time a unit disembarks from this **TRANSPORT** after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 soulshatter lascannons; twin inferno heavy bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 1 inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 inferno combi-weapon

fluff.en: Chaos Land Raiders employed by the Thousand Sons are slab-sided armoured monsters commonly used to bear Scarab Occult Terminators into battle. Their hulls dance with energy or writhe in constant mutagenic peristalsis as their heavy weapons blaze ceaselessly.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** models. Each **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit that was hit by one or more Psychic Attacks made by a **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model from your army this phase (including the Doombolt Ritual), you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Damage roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Predator twin lascannon; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 1 inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 inferno combi-weapon
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 2 lascannons ◦ 2 inferno heavy bolters

fluff.en: The Predator Annihilators of the Thousand Sons stalk enemy behemoths across the battlefield like hulking carrion eaters. The precognitive whispers of unnatural entities guide each blast of searing laser energy these battle tanks unleash while the undying hatred of their crews stokes the fires of their engines.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) that was hit by one or more Psychic Attacks made by a **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model from your army this phase (including the Doombolt Ritual), improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Predator autocannon; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 1 inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 inferno combi-weapon
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 2 lascannons ◦ 2 inferno heavy bolters

fluff.en: Predator Destructors use their rapid-firing weaponry to reap a tally of the enemy. Those of the Thousand Sons fire streams of heavy shells that dance with unnatural energies, the cackle of their possessor cacodaemons mingling with the chatter of their guns and the screams of their victims.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes a Psychic Attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** inferno combi-bolter; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher or can replace 1 inferno combi-bolter with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 1 additional inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 inferno combi-weapon

fluff.en: Many of the Rhinos employed by the Thousand Sons are ancient vehicles, their once-noble machine spirits saturated by the malice of the Warp, their hulls mutated and discoloured by the energies of unfettered change. Still, they bear the foot soldiers of Tzeentch swiftly into battle, guns hammering as they go.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** models (excluding **TERMINATOR** models).

description.en: At the start of each player’s Command phase, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** hideous mutations.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Chaos Spawn are roiling masses of mutating flesh and bone that lurch towards the foe with mindless ferocity. They wail and slobber from fanged maws as they lash wildly about themselves with barbed pseudopods, snapping claws and clubbing limbs, tearing and crushing all who do not flee in horror.

description.en: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** demolisher cannon; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 havoc launcher.
This model can be equipped with one of the following:  ◦ 1 inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 inferno combi-weapon

fluff.en: The Chaos Vindicator is a brutish siege tank whose demolisher cannon fires devastatingly destructive shells that can flatten bunkers, breach fortress walls or vaporise entire squads of foes in a single hit. The Thousand Sons delight in fielding these vehicles, which effect sudden and catastrophic change with every shot.

description.en: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

Each time a friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model with the Cabal of Sorcerers ability is destroyed while within 9" of one or more models with this ability, select one of those models with this ability: until the end of the battle, each time the selected model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result (to a maximum of +2).
While a friendly **THOUSAND SONS INFANTRY** unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Dark Blessing; infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Daemon Princes of the Thousand Sons are potent sorcerers and monstrous warriors both, terrifying in their martial might. Moreover, their mere presence bends the weave of fate into forms more fortuitous for their designs, ensuring that the warriors they lead to battle strike their enemies down with unnatural precision.

name.en: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch with Wings
Daemon Prince of Tzeentch with Wings

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 (if that attack targets a **PSYKER CHARACTER** unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead). Each time this model destroys a **CHARACTER** unit, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that **CHARACTER** unit was a **PSYKER** unit, this model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead).

In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an aetherstride. If it does:
■ It can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
■ Until the end of the turn, its Dark Blessing has the **[SUSTAINED HITS D3]** ability.
■ Until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

composition.en: **1 Daemon Prince of Tzeentch with Wings**

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Dark Blessing; infernal cannon; hellforged weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Buoyed upon sorcerous zephyrs or borne aloft by wings of mutated flesh, these Daemon Princes revel in hurling arcane fire from on high, reinforcing their megalomaniacal superiority over their foes.

description.en: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem. For each of those attacks that targets an enemy unit within 9" of one or more **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** units from your army, a hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ instead.
While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 1 Hades battle cannon; 2 excruciator cannons; 1 heavy missile launcher; 1 heavy baleflamer; 1 shearing claws

wargear.en: This model’s heavy missile launcher can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Hades lascannon ◦ 1 heavy reaper autocannon ◦ 1 electroscourge (a model cannot be equipped with more than one electroscourge)

This model’s heavy baleflamer can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Hades lascannon ◦ 1 heavy reaper autocannon ◦ 1 electroscourge (a model cannot be equipped with more than one electroscourge)
This model’s excruciator cannons can be replaced with 2 pyraflux magma cutters.
This model’s Hades battle cannon can be replaced with 1 ectoplasma destructor.

fluff.en: These hulking masses of sorcery-wreathed mechanisms and daemon-bound flesh advance upon mechanical limbs that crush and rend even as the monstrosity’s heavy guns rain death on the foe, while shrugging off enemy fire by transmuting incoming projectiles or reknitting their flesh to repair damage.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit; on a 6, you can return up to 2 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Astral Blast; inferno bolt pistol; force weapon.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Prosperine khopesh.

fluff.en: Greatest amongst Magnus’ lieutenants, each Exalted Sorcerer is an embodiment of forbidden power and monstrous ambition. From the soul-burning gouts of their warpflame pistols to the unfettered might of their sorcery and the shimmering shields cast by their corrupt sigils of Tzeentch, they are terrifyingly potent warriors.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RUBRIC MARINES**

name.en: Exalted Sorcerer on Disc of Tzeentch
Exalted Sorcerer on Disc of Tzeentch

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with Arcane Fire. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is ensnared. While a unit is ensnared, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Arcane Fire; inferno bolt pistol; force weapon.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Prosperine khopesh.

fluff.en: Only the greatest wielders of esoteric power are said to be granted one of Tzeentch’s daemonic steeds. Exalted Sorcerers ride these soaring Discs on plumes of arcane flame while they manipulate coruscating energy in twisting firestorms.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RUBRIC MARINES** ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED** ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED WITH FATECASTER GREATBOWS**

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 Hades autocannons; 1 Forgefiend jaws.

wargear.en: This model’s Forgefiend jaws can be replaced with 1 ectoplasma cannon and 1 Forgefiend claws.
This model’s 2 Hades autocannons can be replaced with 2 ectoplasma cannons.

fluff.en: The ectoplasma cannons and Hades autocannons of the Forgefiends draw their furious energies direct from the blazing daemon forges at the heart of each murderous artillery engine. So do they unleash salvoes of blazing weaponised hatred that eradicate the Thousand Sons’ enemies in droves.

description.en: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has shot or fought, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is within 9" of one or more **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** units from your army.
If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** missile launcher; multi-melta; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For each Helbrute fist this model is equipped with, it can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 inferno combi-bolter ◦ 1 heavy flamer
This model’s missile launcher can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Helbrute fist ◦ 1 Helbrute hammer ◦ 1 power scourge
This model’s multi-melta can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Helbrute plasma cannon ◦ 1 twin autocannon ◦ 1 twin inferno heavy bolter ◦ 1 twin lascannon ◦ 1 Helbrute fist

fluff.en: Each Thousand Sons Helbrute is a walking torture chamber piloted by a mutilated Chaos Space Marine lured and bound by the Legion’s Sorcerers into volunteering for this hideous pact. Blending martial might and armoured resilience with murderous insanity, these vile machines are deadly to any foe they encounter.

description.en: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Hades autocannon; Heldrake claws.

wargear.en: This model’s Hades autocannon can be replaced with 1 baleflamer.

fluff.en: Swooping low over the battlefield upon flame-wreathed wings, Heldrakes send their enemies diving for cover. Weaving and jinking like living beasts, they unleash torrents of fire from their blazing jaw-guns, tear enemy aircraft from the skies with their vicious talons, and honour Tzeentch with every sacrificial kill.

name.en: Fires of the Abyss – Focused witchfire

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
Once per turn, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** inferno bolt pistol; Fires of the Abyss; force weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Infernal Masters forge pacts with daemonic entities, euphemistically called tutelaries. Upon the battlefield they can unleash the powers of these malign familiars to engulf their foes in swarms of momentarily corporeal terrors, to divine whispers of the future or to master the currents of the empyrean itself.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RUBRIC MARINES**

description.en: At the start of the battle round, select one of the abilities in the Crimson King section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

name.en: Lord of the Planet of the Sorcerers

description.en: This model can attempt up to two Rituals per turn instead of one, and each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 2 to the Psychic test result.
Each time an attack is made against this **PSYKER** (excluding Psychic Attacks), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 24" of this **PSYKER**. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.
While a friendly **THOUSAND SONS** unit is within 6" of this **PSYKER**, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.
While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Gaze of Magnus; Tzeentch’s Firestorm; Blade of Magnus.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: None dare meet the one-eyed gaze of the Crimson King. He is a nexus of sorcerous energies, a sentient confluence of fate and magic bound within the shimmering flesh of a daemonic demigod. Magnus unleashes his magicks in an unstoppable tempest, and the luckiest of his victims are those who die swiftly.

description.en:
• You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:
  • That use is -1 CP.
  • That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.
  • When this unit **declares a charge**, If a friendly engaged **PSYKER** unit is within 12" of this unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
    • This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.
    • This unit must end that **charge move engaged** with an enemy unit **engaged** with that friendly **PSYKER** unit.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** lasher tendrils; Maulerfiend fists.

wargear.en: This model’s lasher tendrils can be replaced with 2 magma cutters.

fluff.en: Maulerfiends are ferocious Daemon Engines capable of scaling even sheer fortress walls with their wicked metal talons. Those employed by the Thousand Sons are inescapable, for the daemons within them hunt as much by tracking their prey’s future choices as by the lights of their soulspoor.

description.en: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds. Each enemy unit within range of this ability must then take a Battle-shock test.

While a friendly **THOUSAND SONS PSYKER** model is within 6" of this model, each time that model Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result. This is not cumulative with any other modifiers to the Psychic test result.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** warp vortex; betentacled maw; Mutalith claws.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: This foul beast is an offence against sanity and natural order. Its constantly mutating form drags in and expels empyric energy in a wild tempest that twists all about it ever further out of truth. Those foes not driven insane by the monster’s presence are soon warped into fresh horrors by its foul energies.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.
Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit (excluding **CHARACTERS**) have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

loadout.en:
**The Aspiring Sorcerer is equipped with:** inferno bolt pistol; Malefic Curse; force weapon.
**Every Rubric Marine is equipped with:** inferno boltgun; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: 1 Rubric Marine can be equipped with 1 icon of flame.
1 Rubric Marine’s inferno boltgun can be replaced with 1 soulreaper cannon.
Any number of Rubric Marines can each have their inferno boltgun replaced with 1 warpflamer.
The Aspiring Sorcerer’s inferno bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 warpflame pistol.

fluff.en: Advancing at the command of their sorcerous master, Rubric Marines lay down withering hails of fire. Arcane shells from their inferno weapons and soulreaper cannons blast the enemy apart while gouts of mutagenic fire from their warpflamers burn and twist flesh and soul. Against such an onslaught, none can stand for long.

description.en: While this unit contains one or more **PSYKER** models, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

loadout.en:
**The Scarab Occult Sorcerer is equipped with:** inferno combi-bolter; Malefic Curse; force weapon.
**Every Scarab Occult Terminator is equipped with:** inferno combi-bolter; Prosperine khopesh.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Scarab Occult Terminator can be equipped with 1 hellfyre missile rack.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Scarab Occult Terminator’s inferno combi-bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy warpflamer ◦ 1 soulreaper cannon
The Scarab Occult Sorcerer’s inferno combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 Prosperine khopesh.

fluff.en: The Scarab Occult fight with all the merciless skill they did when they were Magnus’ living bodyguards, often striking into the heart of the foe via sorcerous teleportation. Wielding vicious ritual blades based on the ancient Prosperine khopesh, they cleave through those victims not laid low by their salvoes of lethal firepower.

description.en: Once per turn, when you target this unit with the **Fire Overwatch**/**Heroic Intervention stratagem**, that use is -1 CP.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** heavy warpflamer; hellfyre missile rack; pyreflux meltagun; close combat weapon

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their pyreflux meltagun replaced with 1 warpflame projector and 1 power claw.

fluff.en: Sekhetar Robots are often employed by their sorcerous masters as prophetic sentinels to guard sites of power or stalk unwary interlopers. Inscribed with spells of illusion and obfuscation, Sekhetar Robots can be hidden, awaiting the moment to activate and turn their arcane weapons on the foe in gouts of empyric energy and sorcerous missiles.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Once per battle, in your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by this model by 3.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** inferno bolt pistol; Pandaemonic Delusion; force weapon.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Prosperine khopesh.

fluff.en: The Sorcerers of the Thousand Sons direct the ranks of Rubricae in battle. All the while, they wield their twisted sorceries to wrack the foe with rampant mutation, unleash unnatural firestorms upon the enemy or veil their warriors behind flickering illusions, protected throughout by the fickle favour of Tzeentch.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **RUBRIC MARINES**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit that is visible to this **PSYKER** model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Gaze of Hate; inferno combi-bolter; force weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s inferno combi-bolter can be replaced with 1 inferno combi-weapon.

fluff.en: Clad in hulking Terminator plate, a Sorcerer of the Thousand Sons can shrug off even the punishing fire of anti-tank weaponry. So protected, they are free to unleash their mutative magicks with impunity, leading offensives into even the most heavily defended enemy strongpoints and laying low any who bar their path.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS**

description.en: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** divining spear.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their divining spear replaced with 1 autopistol and 1 chainsword.

fluff.en: Blessed amongst their mutated kind, the Enlightened can see the skeins of fate through communion with Tzeentch. They surge atop daemonic Discs on the hunt for esoteric knowledge. Tzaangor Enlightened close on their targets, emitting screeches of anticipatory triumph, and their divining spears hum as they sense their predestined prey.

description.en: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** fatecaster greatbow; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: When armed with fatecaster greatbows, Tzaangor Enlightened use their position atop their fanged and bladed daemonic mounts to view the fl ow of causality. With their bows’ ectoplasmic cords pulled taut, these arcane predators seek out those foes whose pivotal actions can change destinies before loosing their ensorcelled arrows to cut short such a fate.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, select one Bodyguard model in that unit; that Bodyguard model is destroyed and, until the end of the phase, add D3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by this model.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Baleful Devolution; force stave.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Tzaangor Shamans possess prodigious sorcerous abilities that stem from their faith in Tzeentch, and can unleash ferocious psychic bombardments against the foe as they soar high upon their daemonic Discs. The mere presence of these bestial champions inspires the herds they lead to ever greater heights of violence.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED** ■ **TZAANGOR ENLIGHTENED WITH FATECASTER GREATBOWS** ■ **TZAANGORS**

description.en: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.
You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Tzaangor blades.

wargear.en: 1 Tzaangor not equipped with a brayhorn can be equipped with 1 herd banner.
1 Tzaangor not equipped with a herd banner can be equipped with 1 brayhorn.
Any number of models can each have their Tzaangor blades replaced with 1 autopistol and 1 chainsword.

fluff.en: Brayhorn blasts and avian shrieks herald the onset of the Tzaangors. These mutated shock troops surge into battle wielding baroque blades or roaring chainswords with vicious skill. Return shots and blows are deflected by whirling skeins of dark sorcery, for these creatures belong to Tzeentch body and soul.
